It is native to New Zealand and is considered to be a part of the Goodeniaceae family, which consists of various species of flowering plants. The Goodeniaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Goodenioideae and Scaevolioideae subfamilies. Rodwaya thismiacea belongs to the Goodenioideae subfamily. This classification places Rodwaya thismiacea within a larger group of flowering plants that are predominantly found in the Southern Hemisphere.
